name: Hungarian Goulash-- Crockpot
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Round steaks, cut into half-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Put steak cubes, onion, garlic in crockpot.
2. Stir in flour and mix to coat steak cubes.
3. Add all remaining ingredients except sour cream.
4. Stir well. Cover and cook on Low for 8-10 hours.
5. (High: stir occasionally for 4-5 hours.)
6. Add sour cream 30 minutes before serving, and stir thoroughly.
7. Serve over hot buttered noodles.
